data.content:
### Replace Tailwind `w-* h-*` with `size-*` Utility Source: https://github.com/shadcn-ui/ui/blob/main/apps/v4/content/docs/(root)/tailwind-v4.mdx This diff demonstrates the migration from using separate `w-*` and `h-*` Tailwind utility classes to the new `size-*` utility. The `size-*` utility, introduced in Tailwind v3.4, is fully supported by `tailwind-merge` and provides a more concise way to define both width and height. ```diff - w-4 h-4 + size-4 ``` -------------------------------- ### Create a new Astro project with Tailwind CSS and React Source: https://github.com/shadcn-ui/ui/blob/main/apps/v4/content/docs/installation/astro.mdx Initializes a new Astro project named 'astro-app' using the Tailwind CSS template. This command automatically installs dependencies, adds React integration, and sets up Git for version control. ```bash npx create-astro@latest astro-app --template with-tailwindcss --install --add react --git ``` -------------------------------- ### Apply Themed Colors with Tailwind CSS (TSX) Source: https://github.com/shadcn-ui/ui/blob/main/apps/v4/content/docs/components/chart.mdx Shows how to use Tailwind CSS utility classes to apply themed colors to components like `LabelList`, referencing CSS variables directly. This approach integrates shadcn-ui's theming with Tailwind for consistent styling. ```tsx ``` -------------------------------- ### Theming with Utility Classes in React Source: https://github.com/shadcn-ui/ui/blob/main/apps/v4/content/docs/(root)/theming.mdx Illustrates applying background and foreground colors using Tailwind utility classes for theming. This method is an alternative to CSS variables and requires setting `cssVariables` to `false` in `components.json`. ```tsx
``` -------------------------------- ### Add TypeScript `cn` Helper for Merging Tailwind CSS Classes Source: https://github.com/shadcn-ui/ui/blob/main/apps/v4/content/docs/installation/manual.mdx This TypeScript utility function, `cn`, combines `clsx` and `tailwind-merge` to efficiently merge multiple class values into a single, optimized string. Intended for `lib/utils.ts`, it simplifies conditional styling and avoids class conflicts when working with Tailwind CSS, providing a robust way to manage dynamic class names in components. It depends on the `clsx` and `tailwind-merge` packages. ```typescript import { clsx, type ClassValue } from "clsx" import { twMerge } from "tailwind-merge" export function cn(...inputs: ClassValue[]) { return twMerge(clsx(inputs)) } ``` -------------------------------- ### Add new Tailwind CSS colors in a shadcn/ui registry item configuration Source: https://github.com/shadcn-ui/ui/blob/main/apps/v4/content/docs/registry/faq.mdx This JSON snippet demonstrates how to extend Tailwind CSS colors within a shadcn/ui registry item by adding them to the `cssVars` property. New colors are defined under both `light` and `dark` themes using HSL values, allowing them to be used as utility classes like `bg-brand` and `text-brand-accent` after the project CSS file is updated by the CLI. ```json { "$schema": "https://ui.shadcn.com/schema/registry-item.json", "name": "hello-world", "title": "Hello World", "type": "registry:block", "description": "A complex hello world component", "files": [ // ... ], "cssVars": { "light": { "brand-background": "20 14.3% 4.1%", "brand-accent": "20 14.3% 4.1%" }, "dark": { "brand-background": "20 14.3% 4.1%", "brand-accent": "20 14.3% 4.1%" } } } ``` -------------------------------- ### Migrate from `tailwindcss-animate` to `tw-animate-css` in CSS Source: https://github.com/shadcn-ui/ui/blob/main/apps/v4/content/docs/(root)/tailwind-v4.mdx This diff illustrates the change required in the `globals.css` file when migrating from the deprecated `tailwindcss-animate` plugin to `tw-animate-css`. It shows the removal of the `@plugin` directive for the old library and the addition of an `@import` statement for the new one. ```diff - @plugin 'tailwindcss-animate'; + @import "tw-animate-css"; ``` -------------------------------- ### Apply Themed Colors within Chart Data (TypeScript) Source: https://github.com/shadcn-ui/ui/blob/main/apps/v4/content/docs/components/chart.mdx Demonstrates how to embed CSS variable color references directly within the `chartData` array. This allows individual data points or series to inherit colors from the active theme, providing granular control over styling. ```tsx const chartData = [ { browser: "chrome", visitors: 275, fill: "var(--color-chrome)" }, { browser: "safari", visitors: 200, fill: "var(--color-safari)" }, ] ``` -------------------------------- ### Set Responsive Carousel Item Spacing with Tailwind CSS in React/TypeScript Source: https://github.com/shadcn-ui/ui/blob/main/apps/v4/content/docs/components/carousel.mdx Applies responsive spacing to Carousel items using Tailwind CSS `pl-[VALUE]` on items and negative `ml-[VALUE]` on `CarouselContent`. Spacing adjusts for different screen sizes, providing 0.5rem on small and 1rem on medium screens and up. ```tsx ... ... ... ``` -------------------------------- ### Conditionally Style shadcn/ui Sidebar based on collapsible state Source: https://github.com/shadcn-ui/ui/blob/main/apps/v4/content/docs/components/sidebar.mdx This snippet illustrates how to apply conditional styling to a `SidebarGroup` component within a shadcn/ui `Sidebar`. It uses a Tailwind CSS utility class (`group-data-[collapsible=icon]:hidden`) to hide the group when the sidebar is in `icon` mode, providing dynamic layout adjustments based on the sidebar's state. ```tsx ``` -------------------------------- ### Set Responsive Carousel Item Size with Tailwind CSS in React/TypeScript Source: https://github.com/shadcn-ui/ui/blob/main/apps/v4/content/docs/components/carousel.mdx Applies responsive sizing to Carousel items using Tailwind CSS `basis` utility classes. Items are configured to be 50% width on medium screens (`md:basis-1/2`) and 33% on large screens (`lg:basis-1/3`). ```tsx // 50% on small screens and 33% on larger screens. ... ... ... ``` -------------------------------- ### Set Fixed Carousel Item Spacing with Tailwind CSS in React/TypeScript Source: https://github.com/shadcn-ui/ui/blob/main/apps/v4/content/docs/components/carousel.mdx Applies fixed spacing between Carousel items using Tailwind CSS `pl-[VALUE]` on items and a negative `ml-[VALUE]` on `CarouselContent`. This example uses a 1rem spacing across all items. ```tsx ... ... ... ``` -------------------------------- ### Update Components for New Dark Mode Colors using CLI Source: https://github.com/shadcn-ui/ui/blob/main/apps/v4/content/docs/(root)/tailwind-v4.mdx This command line snippet shows how to update all components in a project using the `shadcn` CLI. The `--overwrite` flag is crucial as it will replace existing components, making it suitable for adopting new dark mode colors or other component updates. Users are advised to commit changes before running this command. ```bash npx shadcn@latest add --all --overwrite ``` -------------------------------- ### Fetch Sidebar Menu Data with SWR in React Source: https://github.com/shadcn-ui/ui/blob/main/apps/v4/content/docs/components/sidebar.mdx Illustrates how to populate a `SidebarMenu` with data fetched using the SWR library. It includes handling loading states with a skeleton component and rendering fetched project items, similar to the RSC approach but using a client-side data fetching library. ```tsx function NavProjects() { const { data, isLoading } = useSWR("/api/projects", fetcher) if (isLoading) { return ( {Array.from({ length: 5 }).map((_, index) => ( ))} ) } if (!data) { return ... } return ( {data.map((project) => ( {project.name} ))} ) } ``` -------------------------------- ### Render Rounded Icon Button Source: https://github.com/shadcn-ui/ui/blob/main/apps/v4/content/docs/components/button.mdx Shows how to create a fully rounded icon button by applying the Tailwind CSS `rounded-full` class to an icon button variant. ```tsx ```
